center.name: 艾伦·奥克塔文·休姆
center.summary: 艾伦·奥克塔文·休姆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括白颊山鹧鸪、褐翅鸦鹃、Andaman nightjar等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Andaman nightjar (Caprimulgus andamanicus) is a species of nightjar found in the Andaman Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Andaman scops owl (Otus balli) is a species of the Strigidae family and is native to the Andaman Islands of India. It is a largely brown owl with white speckles and yellow eyes.{{Cite journal |last1=Holt |first1=Denver W

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Finn's weaver (Ploceus megarhynchus), also known as Finn's baya and yellow weaver is a weaver bird species native to the Ganges and Brahmaputra valleys in India and Nepal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Omani owl (Strix butleri) is an owl of the genus Strix found in shrubland and rocky areas of Oman, Iran and the United Arab Emirates. It was discovered in 2013

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-cheeked partridge (Arborophila atrogularis) is a species of partridge in the family Phasianidae, native to Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Burmese bush lark (Plocealauda microptera) or Burmese lark, is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The upper back is black and the juvenile has unbarred wings. * Race intermedius Hume, 1873 — smaller in size and found in Bangladesh, west Cachar and into Myanmar and the Chin Hills into China (Yunnan, Hainan), Thailand, Indochina and the northern part of the Malay Peninsula. * Race bubutus Horsfield, 1821 — found in the southern part of the Malay Peninsula into the islands of Sumatra, Nias, Mentawai Islands, Java, Bali, Borneo, western Philippines (Balabac, Cagayan Sulu and Palawan)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-capped fulvetta (Schoeniparus dubius) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Bhutan, China, India, Laos, Myanmar, and Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mongolian ground jay (Podoces hendersoni) or Henderson's ground jay is a species of bird in the family Corvidae, found in Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The saxaul sparrow (Passer ammodendri) is a passerine bird of the sparrow family (Passeridae), found in parts of Central Asia
